title: Fagelia lanceolata
taxonomy: Fagelia lanceolata is classified in the family Ericaceae. This plant is native to the Himalayas, and its classification places it within the order Ericales. The specific classification of Fagelia lanceolata is Fagelia lanceolata, and it is often found growing in shaded, humid environments. Within the Ericaceae family, Fagelia lanceolata shares characteristics with other plants such as rhododendrons and blueberries.
